data.title: Pump.fun's revenue in February decreased by 38% month-on-month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DefiLlama data, pump.fun's agreement fee income in February was $75.28 million, a decrease of 38% compared to January ($121 million). If calculated on a weekly basis, pump.fun generated $7.76 million in agreement income in the past week, a decrease of nearly 80% compared to the highest income in history ($37.31 million) in the week of January 19.

data.title: Zhu Su calls for ETH: If you believe in the future of decentralized open source, the price of $2222 is a safe choice
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Zhu Su, co-founder of Three Arrows Capital, wrote, "Today, it is difficult to bet on Ethereum from a technical perspective alone, but if you believe that the decentralized open source community can self-correct and self-govern towards a prosperous future, then betting at $2,222 is a safe choice."

data.title: PeckShield: Someone is using flash loans to manipulate Punks market quotes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News PeckShield posted on the X platform that the report showed that some users used flash loans to make false bids in the CryptoPunks market.
An unknown operator is using the flash loan mechanism to create false bids in the Punks NFT market, which may disrupt market pricing and mislead other traders.
Flash loans are an unsecured loan mechanism in the DeFi field that allows users to borrow and return funds within the same transaction block and are often used for arbitrage or attacks. In the NFT market, this behavior may be used to artificially manipulate prices or create false market activity.
At present, PeckShield has not released more details and recommends that users remain vigilant when trading in the CryptoPunks market.

data.title: DoraHacks, Dora Ventures and Google Cloud reach strategic partnership
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: At BUIDL Day, DoraHacks and Dora Ventures officially announced a strategic partnership with Google Cloud. As part of this partnership, Google Cloud will provide $350,000 in cloud computing and AI service support to the most promising startup teams in the DoraHacks ecosystem. At the same time, the two parties will jointly launch more developer incentive programs focused on cutting-edge technology, including hackathon cooperation in core areas such as quantum computing and open source hardware.

data.title: Privasea and Intract reach strategic cooperation: privacy authentication drives the future of Web3 trusted AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Privasea's privacy authentication application ImHuman has been officially integrated into Intract's Persona Network, which uses fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) technology to achieve decentralized identity authentication, ensuring user data sovereignty while enabling real users to safely access AI services, precise airdrops and Web3 ecosystem benefits. Intract's Persona Network has covered more than 200 countries and 6 million users, providing developers with compliant user portrait data to reduce the risk of false identities and helping ordinary users to profit from private data assets. This cooperation marks the leap from Web3 to a trusted AI ecosystem verified by real people. Through the integration of encrypted computing and identity networks, the two parties reshape the interactive paradigm of digital identity and data value, and promote the industry to evolve in a safer and more efficient direction.

data.title:
$BTC Weekend so not expecting much in terms of BTC.

For the first time in weeks, we actually saw BTC rally at the end of the week on Friday. Most previous weeks we saw a rally into Friday only to fall right before the weekend. It was the opposite way around now.

We'll see where…
In 2018, ETH whales sold 4,245 ETH again in one week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, in 2018, the ETH whale sold 4,245 ETH again after a week, worth 9.44 million US dollars. Since February 15, the cumulative amount of ETH sold has reached 16,499 ETH (42.92 million US dollars). The address recharged ETH to Binance 8 hours ago and was suspected of selling. Its ETH cost was as low as $194. If it was sold, it would make a profit of 8.62 million US dollars.

data.title: The CEBG ecological token CEC of the chain game has increased by as much as 610% in 24 hours and is currently trading at US$0.034.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the CEC token of the blockchain game CEBG ecosystem has a maximum increase of 610% in 24 hours and is now reported at $0.034.
It is reported that CEBG announced its AI+game strategy on Friday, and will launch an AI Gaming middle layer based on AI and game communication protocols to provide core services such as intelligent generation, AI chain reasoning, and instant messaging for various games. It is planned to land on the first game within March, and at the same time upgrade PvAI narrative promotion.

data.title: Yuga Labs Co-Founder Highlights Spoofing Concerns in Punks Market
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 2, Yuga Labs co-founder Greg Solano reported that there are instances of individuals using flash loans to create fake bids in the Punks market. This practice, known as spoofing, involves manipulating market activity to deceive participants.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin changed his Twitter profile picture to a character from the game "World of Warcraft"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vitalik Buterin changed his Twitter account profile to a creature from World of Warcraft, and the Twitter account profile is "I choose balance. First-level balance. mi pinxe lo crino tcati". This character is a druid in the game and has a talent for balance. Previously, Vitalik's Twitter profile was the Milady series NFT.
